title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Narayana Health Digital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Narayana Health Digital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Narayana Health Digital! We are hiring a Backend Developer for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Narayana Health Digital:
Narayana Health Digital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital!
